scope: No funding-rate gating on perpetual positions
corrected_assertion: Funding-rate gating ships as part of the Binance Futures perps Stage 3 rollout. Two thresholds: (1) ADD-GATE: funding rate > +0.05%/8h → do NOT add to existing short positions (long-funded perps are paying us, but stacking adds compounds funding-cost expectancy negatively). (2) CIRCUIT-BREAKER: funding rate > +0.08%/8h OR regime flip to news-day → CLOSE_ALL_SHORTS market order, no override possible. Liquidation price band requirement: ≥15% above entry (asymmetric vs longs at 4% stop-loss — shorts have unbounded loss profile). Max leverage by regime: chop-day=1x, trend-day=2x, chop-active=1x, news-day=0x (no new perps positions on news-day). Implementation: mae/gates/perp-funding-gate.ts + mae/gates/perp-leverage-by-regime.ts.
source: GH Project #31 item #220 [GCP-CUTOVER · Shorts · Funding Gate] + operator Risk Committee decision 2026-05-13
